segments.text: Michael shall stand up, The great prince who stands watch over the sons of your people; And there shall be a time of trouble, Such as never was since there was a nation, Even to that time. And at that time your people shall be delivered, Every one who is found written in the book.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: Many of those who sleep in the dust of the earth shall awake
Some to everlasting life, Some to shame and everlasting contempt.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: Those who are wise shall shine
Like the brightness of the firmament, And those who turn many to righteousness Like the stars forever and ever.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: But you, Daniel, shut up the words, and seal the book until the time of the end; many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall increase.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: I, Daniel, looked; and there stood two others, one on this riverbank and the other on that riverbank.
How long shall the fulfillment of these wonders be?
segments.speaker: One by the river

segments.text: I heard the man clothed in linen, who was above the waters of the river, when he held up his right hand and his left hand to heaven, and swore
It shall be for a time, times, and half a time; and when the power of the holy people has been completely shattered, all these things shall be finished.
segments.speaker: Man clothed in linen

segments.text: Although I heard, I did not understand.
My lord, what shall be the end of these things?
segments.speaker: Daniel

segments.text: Go your way, Daniel, for the words are closed up and sealed till the time of the end.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: Many shall be purified, made white, and refined, but the wicked shall do wickedly; and none of the wicked shall understand, but the wise shall understand.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: From the time that the daily sacrifice is taken away, and the abomination of desolation is set up, there shall be one thousand two hundred and ninety days.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: Blessed is he who waits, and comes to the one thousand three hundred and thirty-five days.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger

segments.text: But you, go your way till the end; for you shall rest, and will arise to your inheritance at the end of the days.
segments.speaker: Divine Messenger
